title: Add a bilingual 60-second quick-start block to docs/WHAT-IS-WEBAZ.md
summary: Insert a short, scannable quick-start block (EN + 中文) near the top of WHAT-IS-WEBAZ.md so a first-time reader grasps WebAZ in under a minute. Documentation only.
acceptance_criteria: A quick-start block exists near the top of docs/WHAT-IS-WEBAZ.md
Both EN and 中文 are present (bilingual parity)
No other section of the file is altered
expected_results: at least one EN heading match, with a 中文 counterpart present
deliverables: Updated docs/WHAT-IS-WEBAZ.md with a bilingual quick-start block
definition_of_done: Bilingual quick-start block is merge-ready; no code or other docs touched; maintainer can read the diff in under a minute.
